json_metadata_summary.purpose: Define safe governance for future dynamic Daily Guidance, Panchang, Festival, Mantra, Word of the Day, and reflective guidance modules.
Define the future rule structure for Daily Guidance without enabling dynamic public output.
Validate future Daily Guidance rule candidates and produce preview-only selections without enabling live dynamic guidance.
Reviewed word bank for future Word of the Day rotation. Public dynamic rotation is not enabled in this stage.

Candidate mantra records for future review. These are not live public dynamic outputs.
Policy scaffold for future mantra display in subscriber daily guidance.

Defines the controlled local Panchang calculation engine input/output schema. This scaffold does not publish public Panchang claims.

Defines the controlled method registry for future subscriber daily guidance: lucky number, lucky color, mantra, what to do, what not to do, and reflection note.
Schema for future authenticated subscriber daily guidance including lucky number, lucky color, mantra, and recommended do/don't actions.
